headline: HAS Q1 Deep Dive: Magic Drives Growth, Guidance Remains Unchanged Amid Cost Pressures
summary: Toy and entertainment company Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 12.7% year on year to $1 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.47 per share was 29.5% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Take-Two Q4 Earnings Beat on Strong Revenue & Margin Growth
summary: TTWO beats Q4 estimates as revenues rise 6%, margins expand and FY27 bookings guidance points to continued growth.

raw.headline: Take-Two Q4 Earnings Beat on Strong Revenue & Margin Growth
raw.summary: TTWO beats Q4 estimates as revenues rise 6%, margins expand and FY27 bookings guidance points to continued growth.

headline: Hasbro finds a star revenue player in Magic: The Gathering
summary: The toy company reported $1 billion in net revenue in Q1. Revenue for the Wizards of the Coast division, which oversees Magic, was up 26%.
